payload.evidence: Symphony target commit 61e92c2a73ba3381e0d50b11509ba0eeed079bc9 provides one-member workspace metadata, regenerated Cargo/npm locks without harness-cli, Rust 1.92 and Node 24.9 pins, direct Linux/macOS/Windows CI, provisional merge-mode Harness template without DB initialization, and product-owned Web identity. Local and third-directory fresh clone passed 99 Rust tests, fmt, clippy, locked release build, npm ci, Web build, 19 Playwright tests, desktop smoke, and fail-closed negative fixtures.
